§6Electrical Grid: Cables, Wires & Transformers§f

§aConstruct a high-voltage electrical grid to distribute power throughout your factory!§f
Generating power is only half the battle. You must build a secure, efficient transmission network to deliver electricity to your machines.

§6Energy Cables§f:
Industrial Renewal cables carry Forge Energy (FE) with strict transfer limits per connector:
§b• LV Energy Cable§f: Low Voltage. Handles up to §e256 FE/tick§f.
§b• MV Energy Cable§f: Medium Voltage. Handles up to §e1,024 FE/tick§f.
§b• HV Energy Cable§f: High Voltage. Handles up to §e10,240 FE/tick§f.

§6HV Overhead Wires & Transformers§f:
To transmit power over long distances without placing hundreds of cable blocks, use overhead utility poles:
§b• HV Wire§f: Can bridge a gap of up to §e64 blocks§f between wire connectors.
§b• HV Transformer§f: Converts wire currents back into cable currents. Handles up to §e10,240 FE/tick§f.

§6Battery Storage Banks§f:
Store excess energy to prevent power outages during peak demand:
§b• Battery Bank§f: Capacity of §e1,000,000 FE§f. Max input/output is §e10,240 FE/tick§f.
§b• Industrial Battery Bank§f: Built for massive grids. Increases maximum transfer rate to §e102,400 FE/tick§f.
§b• Lithium Battery§f: A premium storage module holding up to §e5,000,000 FE§f.
